name: What if I need surgery but the insurance company says no?
description: You have appeal rights. Your surgeon must provide detailed justification linking the surgery to your work injury. A lawyer can expedite approval and prevent imp

mainEntity.name: What if I need surgery but the insurance company says no?

acceptedAnswer.text: You have appeal rights. Your surgeon must provide detailed justification linking the surgery to your work injury. A lawyer can expedite approval and prevent improper denials.
